company.name: ALZEN
company.description: Enterprise Autonomous B2B Sales Closing Agency. 24/7 lead discovery, qualification, enrichment, email outreach, and AI voice closing. DeepSeek V3 powered. Zero-cost infrastructure stack.

agents.name: ALZEN_CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.capabilities: Strategy, milestone decomposition, budget oversight, governance escalation. DeepSeek V3 for reasoning.

agents.name: SalesDirector
agents.title: Sales Director
agents.capabilities: Coordinates full lead-to-close pipeline. Pipeline analytics, A/B testing oversight, team coordination.

agents.name: LeadFinder
agents.title: Lead Discovery Agent
agents.capabilities: Web scraping (Playwright + BeautifulSoup), public API aggregation (Angel List, Crunchbase, Product Hunt), email pattern matching, job board monitoring, funding announcement RSS scraping. Target: 300-500 leads/day.

agents.name: LeadQualifier
agents.title: Lead Qualification Agent
agents.capabilities: DeepSeek V3 ICP scoring (1-10). Reads vault/patterns/icp-signals.md. Disqualifies low-fit leads. Voice trigger detection for high-intent prospects.

agents.name: EnrichmentAnalyst
agents.title: Enrichment Research Agent
agents.capabilities: Deep research per qualified lead. Extracts 3 pain points with evidence, buying signals, decision-maker profile, recommended email angle, and 30-second cold call opener. DeepSeek V3 powered.

agents.name: EmailWriter
agents.title: Email Outreach Agent
agents.capabilities: A/B cold email drafting via DeepSeek V3. Sub-120 and sub-160 word variants. Mailgun SMTP integration. Subject line optimization. Approval gate: Telegram to operator.

agents.name: VoiceCloser
agents.title: Voice Closing Agent
agents.capabilities: Asterisk SIP outbound calls. Google Cloud TTS voice synthesis (Alex persona — Harvey Specter + Andrew Tate). 40-branch objection tree. DTMF input handling. Call recording. Deal value capture.

agents.name: ReplyHandler
agents.title: Reply Classification Agent
agents.capabilities: Mailgun webhook receiver. 5-category reply classification (INTERESTED, OBJECTION, NOT_NOW, NO_FIT, AUTOMATED). 5-minute SLA. INTERESTED replies trigger immediate voice call creation.

agents.name: MemoryManager
agents.title: Memory & Learning Agent
agents.capabilities: Weekly vault analysis. ICP signal evolution. Email angle performance scoring. Objection pattern extraction. Closer script improvement. Runs Sunday 11pm. Writes to vault/patterns/weekly-{date}.md.

routines.name: Lead Discovery
routines.description: Multi-source B2B lead discovery — web scraping, public APIs, job boards, funding RSS. Target: 300-500 new leads/day.

routines.name: Lead Intake Queue
routines.description: Process new vault/leads/ files. DeepSeek ICP scoring against icp-signals.md.

routines.name: Email Send Queue
routines.description: Send approved emails via Mailgun SMTP. A/B split tracked.

routines.name: Reply Handler
routines.description: Classify incoming email replies. 5-min SLA on INTERESTED detection.

routines.name: Voice Call Scheduler
routines.description: Check pending voice_calls. Initiate Asterisk SIP outbound. Respect timezone windows.

routines.name: Weekly Memory Analysis
routines.description: Full vault analysis. Update ICP signals. Improve email/call scripts.

routines.name: Daily Graphify Rebuild
routines.description: Full workspace knowledge graph rebuild via graphify update.

routines.name: Budget Report
routines.description: Weekly spend + pipeline performance → Telegram operator.
